calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Dlse Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER EXPRESS MESSENGER SYSTEMS, INC., SUBCONTRACTING CONCEPTS, LLC's Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Dlse Proceedings is Off calendar. The petition to compel arbitration was withdrawn by the moving parties. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
